questions.question: What architectural difference distinguishes an action-conditioned world model (Genie 3) from a pure video generation model (Sora 2)?
options: Pure video generators condition on a prompt at t=0 and roll out; action-conditioned world models take a latent or explicit action per frame so the user can steer the rollout mid-generation
World models only work on 3D scenes
questions.explanation: Sora 2 is autoregressive on spacetime tokens; its prompt sets the scene but you cannot change direction mid-rollout. Genie 3 infers or takes a latent action at each step and conditions the next-frame prediction on it, letting the user interact with the simulated world. This interactivity is what makes a model a 'world simulator' rather than a video generator.
questions.question_zh: 动作条件世界模型（Genie 3）与纯视频生成模型（Sora 2）的架构差异是什么？
options_zh: 纯视频生成器只在 t=0 用 prompt 条件然后 rollout；动作条件世界模型每帧接收一个 latent 或显式动作，让用户可以在生成中途改变方向
世界模型只在 3D 场景上工作
questions.explanation_zh: Sora 2 在时空 token 上自回归；它的 prompt 设定场景，但你不能在 rollout 中途改方向。Genie 3 在每一步推断或接收一个 latent 动作，并以此条件预测下一帧，让用户可与被模拟的世界交互。这种交互性使一个模型成为 'world simulator' 而不仅是视频生成器。

questions.question: Divided attention in a video transformer means what?
options: Each block does a temporal attention (same spatial position, across frames) followed by a spatial attention (same frame, across positions); this factorises cost from O((T*H*W)^2) into O((H*W)*T^2) + O(T*(H*W)^2) — dramatically cheaper than the joint product
Only half the layers run attention
questions.explanation: Full joint attention over spacetime tokens is prohibitive: for T=150 temporal tokens and a 60x45 spatial grid (2700 spatial tokens), the joint (T*H*W)^2 ≈ 1.6e11 pairs. Divided attention runs temporal attention at each spatial position (H*W * T^2 ≈ 6.1e7) and spatial attention at each timestep (T * (H*W)^2 ≈ 1.1e9) — multiple orders of magnitude less. TimeSformer introduced this pattern; almost every 2026 video DiT (Sora, Wan, HunyuanVideo) uses a divided or window variant.
questions.question_zh: 视频 transformer 中的 divided attention 指的是什么？
options_zh: 每个 block 先做时间 attention（同一空间位置跨帧）再做空间 attention（同一帧跨位置）；这把开销从 O((T*H*W)^2) 拆为 O((H*W)*T^2) + O(T*(H*W)^2) ——比 joint 乘积便宜得多
只有一半的层运行 attention
questions.explanation_zh: 对时空 token 做完整 joint attention 代价高得不可行：T=150 时间 token 加上 60x45 的空间网格（2700 个空间 token），joint (T*H*W)^2 ≈ 1.6e11 对。Divided attention 在每个空间位置做时间 attention（H*W * T^2 ≈ 6.1e7），在每个时间步做空间 attention（T * (H*W)^2 ≈ 1.1e9）——少几个数量级。TimeSformer 提出此模式；几乎每个 2026 视频 DiT（Sora、Wan、HunyuanVideo）都用 divided 或 window 变体。

questions.question: Sora 2's 2026 release advertised better physical plausibility. Which specific failure modes did this target?
options: Weight, balance, object permanence, cause-and-effect — the model now handles dropped objects, characters colliding, and 'failures on purpose' (a missed jump) more believably than Sora 1
questions.explanation: Prior-generation video models famously failed on spaghetti-eating, drinking from glasses, and persistent-object scenes — hands would pass through objects, items would disappear mid-action. Sora 2 explicitly advertises improvements on weight, balance, object permanence, and cause-and-effect, measured against internal and public plausibility benchmarks. These are the dominant quality failures the field is still working on.
questions.question_zh: Sora 2 的 2026 年发布主打物理合理性更好。它针对的是哪些具体失败模式？
options_zh: 重量、平衡、物体永久性、因果——模型现在更可信地处理物体下落、角色碰撞和 '故意失败'（一次没跳过的跳跃）
questions.explanation_zh: 前一代视频模型在吃面、喝杯子里的水以及物体持久场景上表现糟糕——手会穿过物体，物品会在动作中消失。Sora 2 明确宣传在重量、平衡、物体永久性和因果方面相对内部和公开合理性 benchmark 的改进。这些是该领域仍在攻克的主要质量失败。

questions.question: In the emerging robotics stack (VLM + video generation + inverse dynamics), what does the inverse dynamics model do?
options: It takes a pair (current observation, desired next observation from the video model) and outputs the low-level motor action that would connect them; this closes the loop between imagined rollouts and actual actuation
questions.explanation: The VLM plans, the video model imagines, and the inverse dynamics model turns imagination into motor commands. Given two consecutive observations, inverse dynamics asks: what action produced this transition? This three-component stack lets a robot train largely in a learned simulator, using the video model to generate data and the inverse dynamics model to execute.
questions.question_zh: 在新兴的机器人栈（VLM + 视频生成 + 逆动力学）中，逆动力学模型做什么？
options_zh: 接收 (当前观测, 视频模型给出的期望下一观测) 这一对，输出能连接两者的低层电机动作；这把想象出的 rollout 闭环到真实驱动
questions.explanation_zh: VLM 规划，视频模型想象，逆动力学模型把想象转为电机指令。给定两个相邻观测，逆动力学问：什么动作产生了这次过渡？这三组件栈让机器人能在学到的模拟器中训练，由视频模型生成数据，由逆动力学模型执行。

questions.question: Autonomous-driving teams use world models (Cosmos-Drive, Gaia-2, DrivingWorld) to replace what cost?
options: Expensive real-world data collection for rare or dangerous corner cases (pedestrian jaywalks, icy roads, unusual vehicles); synthesised driving video provides on-demand training and evaluation data for those scenarios
questions.explanation: Collecting corner-case driving data takes millions of real-world miles. Cosmos-Drive, Gaia-2, and DrivingWorld generate it conditioned on trajectories and maps. Teams use this data to expand training sets, evaluate planners in reproducible conditions, and de-risk scenarios they cannot ethically drive in reality. Replacing a fraction of real-world collection with synthesis is one of the clearest production wins for video world models in 2026.
questions.question_zh: 自动驾驶团队用世界模型（Cosmos-Drive、Gaia-2、DrivingWorld）替代了什么成本？
options_zh: 针对稀有或危险长尾场景（行人闯红灯、冰面、不寻常车辆）昂贵的真实数据采集；合成驾驶视频按需提供这些场景的训练和评估数据
questions.explanation_zh: 采集长尾驾驶数据要花数百万真实里程。Cosmos-Drive、Gaia-2 和 DrivingWorld 在轨迹和地图条件下生成它们。团队用这些数据扩充训练集，在可复现条件下评估 planner，并降低不能合规驾驶场景的风险。把一部分真实采集替换为合成是 2026 年视频世界模型最清晰的生产价值之一。
